_notes: Runnable sample for 'deploy your own VLA': dummy adapter, no GPU, no checkpoint.
Server-only (no 'client' section): nothing touches the arms; poke it with curl http://127.0.0.1:8090/info.
Copy this + deploy/adapters/dummy.py as the starting point for a new policy; activate its environment and set server.adapter to package.module:ClassName.
Port 8090 so it never collides with a real policy on 8080.
